titleStmt.title: SII 9.118: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 118. (A.R. No. 494 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE BHIMESVARA-DEMESVARA TEMPLE AT HIREHADAGALLI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 978, Hēmalambi, Vaiśākha, puṇṇami, Ādityavāra, Sōmagrahaṇa corresponding probably to A.D. 1057 Arpil 21, Monday, not Sunday, lunar eclipse having occurred in Chaitra, i.e., March 23, Sunday. It refers itself to the reign the Chāḷukya king Trailōkyamalladēva, whose genealogy is given as:— Tailapa, his son Satyāśraya, his sons Vikrama, Ayyaṇa, and Jayasiṁha; Jayasiṁha's son Āhavamalladēva, his sons Sōma and Vikramāditya Gaṅga-Permāḍi. The latter is stated to have been ruling over Gaṅgavāḍi ninetysix-thousand, Banavāsi twelvethousand, and Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand, as Kumāra. It states that, at the time, there was a certain Trivikramadēva among the Brāhman Mahājanas of the village Posavaḍaṅgile and that his sons were Nakalimayya and Dēmarasa. Dēmarasa who was known as Viṭachakravartin, was a Mahāmātya. Having built a temple, he set up in it Dēmēśvara and granted land, for the service of the god, to the Mahājanas of Posavaḍaṅgile. The five-hundred Baḷañjus and the hundred-andtwenty Mahājanas made a gift of an oil-mill and some incomes for the service of the god.

In Chālukya-Vikrama year 31, Sarvajit, Chaitra, amāvāsyā, Sūrya-grahaṇa, Vishu-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1107, March 25 Monday, f.d.t., 36 (but with no eclipse), the Daṇḍanāyaka Māchidēva, son-in-law of the Mahāpradhāna Anantapālayya is stated to have granted a part of toll-revenue for the service of the same god. Daṇḍanāyaka Attimarasa, Udayāditiyarasa, son of Chākarasa, Śaṅkaramayya, son of Chandarasa, of Bhāradvāja-gōtra Vīra-Vishṇu Tribhuvana-Poysaḷadēva, Saṅkara-Nāyaka of Beḷaṭe and Śāntivarmayya-Nāyaka and others also made grants for the service of the same god, as time went on. Evidently additions were made to the record as often as grants were made in later times. It is stated that it was Udayāditya who caused the temple to be built under the orders of Dēmarasa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaddēvādidēvaṁ tribhuvanajanakaṁ sarvvagaṁ vēdavēdyaṁ sōmaṁ lōkatrayābhyarcitapadakamaḷaṁ śāśvataṁ viśvavidyādhāmaṁ nūṟippadiṁbarggabhimataphaḷamaṁ māḷke dēmēśanīśaṁ bhūmīṁdvātmā
gnitībradyutipavanajaḷabyōmagātraṁ triṇētraṁ . girijādhīśvaranitta dibyavaradiṁ paṁkējagarbbhaṁ savistaradiṁ nirmmisidaṁ jagattrayamanālōkaṁgaḷoḷu raṁjikuṁ dhare taddhātrige madhyamaiyde lavaṇāṁbhō
rāśisaṁvēṣṭitaṁ suraśaiḷaṁ naḍuvāgaloppuvudu jaṁbūdvīpamā dvīpadoḷu . ka . himavadgiriyiṁ teṁkalu kamanīyamenippa bhāratōrvvīramaṇīramaṇīyakuntaḷōpamavimaḷaśrī
niratameseva kuntaḷadēśa . mudadiṁdadanāḷdaṁ saṁdadaṭiṁ traiḷōkyamallanāhavamallaṁ madavadarimēghapavanaṁ sadayaṁ cāḷukyacakravarttilalāma . va . Ā cāḷukya
cakravartti traiḷōkyamalladēvara vaṁśāvatāramenteṁdeḍe . v® . sarasijagarbhbhamānasasutaṁ munipuṁgavanatri tanmunīśvararamaṇīyanētrakamaḷōdbhavaniṁdu sudhā
mayaṁ kaḷādharaneḷegādudātaninaśēṣajanastutasōmavaṁśamā varavidhunaṁdanaṁ budhananantabudhārccitapādapaṁkaja . Ātana sūnu tāntaḷedanurvviya bhā
ravanā purūravaṁ khyātaguṇaṁ tadīyatanayaṁ vibhu paṁcaśikhaṁ jitāri hārīti varāhalāṁcchananayōdhyegadhīśanibhārivāhanāpūtapadadvayāṁ
bujapalāśasamarccitanātanātmajar . palakālaṁ palarāḷdarurvvareyanantā bhūpariṁdādudujvaḷacāḷukyakuḷaṁ viḷāsayutavēkacchatravuddā
maniścaḷalakṣmīnirataṁ parārtthacaritaṁ niḥkaṁṭakaṁ viśvabhūtaḷavaṁdyaṁ niravadyakīrttilatikādigbhittisaṁmudrita . Udayaṁgeydanudātta tatkuḷasurēśā
drīṁdraduttuṁgakūṭadoḷugrāritamōharaṁ vibudhavaktrēṁdīvarānandadaṁ madavadvairivadhūdṛgutpaḷaviḷāsadhvaṁsi tējōnvitaṁ kadanādityananū
ṇasatyasadanaṁ satyāśrayōrvvīśvaraṁ . kalisatyāśrayabhūmipālajanakaṁ rāṣṭrāvanīrājamaṇḍalamaṁ nuṁge nijāsirāhu sale sarvvagrāsadiṁ ma
rtyarājilasadrāgarasābdhiyoḷu mudadinōlāḍalu jagaṁkoḷvadaṭaṁ gele cāḷukyadivākaraṁ vinatabhūbhṛjjālapaṁ tailapaṁ . dhare niccaṁ pogaḷguṁ paraiṇamadavacchuṁḍā
lavaṁ dhāriṇīdharaśārddūlananuddhatāhitacamūnirmmūlanaṁ saṁgarājirasalālananudghadānasumanassaṁlīlanaṁ satyavistaravākchīlananartthibhītasakalōrvvīpālanaṁ tailanaṁ . dharaṇīśāgraṇitai
lapapriyasutaṁ satyāśrayaṁ tenmahīśvaraputraṁ vibhuvikramaṁ tadanujaṁ saṁdayyaṇaṁ taṁnṛpāvarajaṁ śrījayasiṁhanātana magaṁ traiḷōkyamallaṁ guṇākaranappāhavamalladēvanesedaṁ cāḷukaṁcakrēśvaraṁ .
dhareyoḷu lōkāśrayaṁ viśrutaviśadayaśaṁ viśvarājādhirājaṁ paramēśaN bhūtaḷēndran sakaḷaparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ nityalakṣmīśvaranartthibrātacintāmaṇi nirupamavāgvallabhaṁ sadguṇaughā
bharaṇaṁ traiḷōkyamallaṁ nijakuḷatiḷakaṁ saṁdavāryyōdghaśauryya . cōḷamadēbhapaṁcavadanaṁ magadhāṁbudhibāḍavānaḷaṁ gauḷatamōdinādhipati lāḷaghanāniḷanaṁgavaṁgavaṁ
gāḷavarāḷamāḷavakuḷācaḷavāsavaneṁdaḍāṁparārkkāḷakṛtāṁtakṛṣṇasamaśauryyananāhavamalladēvanaṁ . kaṁ . tattanayaṁ sōmānujanuttamamanumunicaritranāha
varāmaṁ mattēbhavairiśauryyanudāttayaśaṁ dāni gaṁgapermmāḍiNpaṁ . v® . pariyiṭṭī bappanībappane kaḍumuḷisiṁ gaṁgapermmāḍirāyaṁ nirutaṁ tānendu cōḷaṁ madama nuḍugidaṁ gau
ḷanaḷḷāḍidaṁ barbbararājaṁ garbbamaṁ tānuḷidanagidanaṁdhraṁ teraḷdōḍipōdaṁ marubhūpaṁ māḷavaṁ marggidanatibhayadiṁ gūrjjaraṁ gūḍugoṁḍaṁ . parabhūpāḷāndhakāraṁ paraye vina
tabhūbhṛccamūcakravākōtkaravatyutsāhadiṁdaṁ naliye vibhudhavaktrābjavānandamaṁ tāḷdire vīrārātinārīnayanakuvaḷayaśrēṇi tāṁ kūḍe suttuṁ koragal lō
kakke kaṇnuṁ gatiyenalesadaṁ vikramādityadēvaṁ . va . Ā cāḷukyavikramāditya gaṁgapermmāḍidēvaru gaṁgavāḍi toṁbhattaṟu sāsiramumaṁ banavase paṁnicchāsiramumaṁ noḷaṁba
vāḍi mūvaticchāsiramumaṁ kumārav®ttiyiṁ sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralā kōgaḷināḍoḷage . v® . jaḷanidhiyiṁ paḷaṁcalevanēkataṭākadinabjaṣaṇḍadiṁ beḷadeṟa
girdda keyvoladinuṁnatacaṁpakacōcamōcapāṭaḷapanasāṁbrapūgavananāgalatāḷiyinagrahāramaṁgaḷamaṇidarppaṇa posavaḍaṁgileyoppuvadī dharitriyoḷu . tīḍu
va taṁbelarbbaḷasi tadvanalakṣmiya muṁde maṁgaḷaṁbāḍuva tuṁbi kōḍuva puḷilmade pāḍuva haṁsa rāgadiṁdāḍuva sōge bādinoḷavōdinoḷaṁ vibudhāḷiyaṁ todalmāḍuva kīravī posava
ḍaṁgileyoppuva naṁdanaṁgaḷoḷu . cārutarapravāḷaruci miṁcu madāḷi ghanāḷi mallikākōrakamālikalukusumarēṇucayaṁ suracāpavāṁbrabhūjōruphaḷaṁgaḷo
ḷsōneya sōneyenalnirutaṁ basaṁtamuṁ kārumadommeyuṁ posavaḍaṁgileyudghavanāṁtarāḷadoḷu . Elaralapiṁ teṟaṁboḷeva kīḷele sōṁke sitēkṣudaṁḍadiṁ sulalitacūtapakvaphaḷadiṁdugu
tirppa rasapravāhamaṁ gele taṇiyuṁba pūgavananāgalatānavagandhaśāḷi suttalumene raṁjikuṁ posavaḍaṁgile viśvamahītaḷāgradoḷu . jaḷajanibhāsye kairavadaḷāyatalōcane haṁsayāne
pāṭaḷasamagandhi gucchanibiḍastani pallavahaste mattakōkiḷarave cārukēkikabarībhare tānenisippa tatpurīlalaneyanārppane posavaḍaṁgileyaṁ pogaḷalu caturmmukha . ka . puraśōbheyanīkṣisa
līśvaranagadharasamarasamitisumanōvimānōtkarareḷegavatarisidarene karamesaguṁ śaṁkarācyutāvasathaṁgaḷu . v® . purilalanādukūlamagaḷoḷpariraṁjipa nirmaḷāṁbu
bhāsuranavaphēnarājikaḷakāṁcivoloppire kōṭe pīnapīvarakucacārucīnacaḷadaṁśukadantire kētumāḷe vistarataradānadharmada tavarmmanegaḷmanegaḷmanōhara . manemane śaṁkarācyuta
budhātithipūjeyinagnihōtradindanupamavēdanādamaṭhasatrasabhāśivaviṣṇuvāgnikētanatati kērigērijanariṁ sale tiṁtiṇi bīdivīdi tānenisuvudāgaḷuṁ posa
vaḍaṁgile viśvamahītaḷāgradoḷu . ka . janamējayadatti mahīvanitāmaṇimayakucāgrahāraṁ . salesandanupamamahāgrahāraṁ janavandyaṁ dharege posavaḍaṁgile celva .
posakāvyaṁ posagēyaṁ posavādyaṁ posavinūtarasavaṁ Nttaṁ posavastu posaviḷāsaṁ posadēse saṁmantu posavaḍaṁgilegellā . v® . śrīlalanēśaraṁ posavaḍaṁgileyabjajavaṁśamukhya
raṁ pālitadharmaraṁ kṛtavarādhvararaṁ bahuvēdaśāstravākśīlaranartthijaṁgamasurāvanijātaraneyde meynavirnnālageyādaḍaṁ kamaḷasaṁbhavanu pogaḷalsamarthanē . varadabyākaraṇāgamasmṛtipurāṇa
stōmaṣaṭtarkavistaravāgvallabharudghaniścaḷalasallakṣmīvarabhūnutādhvaradīkṣāyajamānarendu pogaḷguṁ sarvvōrvvi nūṟippadiṁbaranuddāmaviḍaṁbaraṁ vijayakīrttiśrīlatālaṁbara .
Avaroḷage . ka . sarasijagarbhbhana mānasavaraputraṁ kauśikaṁ tadīyānvayaśēkhararatnanasedaniḷeyoḷu muraharasamavikramaṁ trivikramadēva . v® . vimaḷajñāna
caturmmukhaṁ kṛtamakhaṁ saujanyalakṣmīsakhaṁ samadārātivighātaśātaviśikhaṁ sadvidyegōjaṁ janāḷimanōjaṁ ravitējanartthisurabhūjaṁ sajjanārādhitakramanatyudghaparākramaṁvimaḷalakṣmītrikramaṁ
trikrama . ka . taneyaṁ trikramadēvaṁganavadyaṁ kauśikānvayāṁbujasūryyaṁ kanakadharādharadhairyyaṁ janavinutaudāryya nakalanakalaṁkayaśa . manucari
tanakalimayyaṁganujaṁ dēmēśapadapayōruhabhriṁgaṁ vinutaṁ dēmarasaṁ sajjananidhi viṭacakravartti kaliyugakāmaṁ . vanaruhavadanada madapikaninadada gurukucada kaṁbukaṁṭha
da m®galōcanada maḷayaruhagaṁdhada vanitānikarakke dēmanabhinavakāmaṁ . v® . calaviḷāsadu(ṁ)nnatiya bīradudārada janmabhūmiyaṁ malevara māriyaṁ miguvarārjjagadoḷu jayadaṁkakāṟanaṁ sulalita
rūpanaṁ subagināgaramaṁ viṭacakravarttiyaṁ kaliyugakāmanaṁ negaḷda dēmananudghayaśōbhirāmana . mēnakīraṁbheyūrbbasitiḷōttameyyaṁnarenippa vārakāntānikaragaḷudghavaracakṣuvoppe nijāṁkamā
leyaṁ mānavamanmathaṁ baredanādaradiṁ viṭacakravartti dhātrīnutamāgi tilutivuḷakaṁnaḍanāgaradakkaraṁgaḷa . ka . kuruḷamuḍiyaṁ daṁtamanuramaṁ kugeyunūruvaṁ beraḷaṁ dēmarasaṁge koṭṭu satiya
rvvare keppaṁ kacci cakravarttiya sabheyoḷu . gōḷiṭṭu satiyaraṁ vaihāḷiyanēṟidanavaḷdira ḍāvaṇiyaṁ līleyoḷe kaṭṭidaṁ guṇabaḷaṁ viṭacakravartti vibhu dēmarasa . v® . varavandibrājavādaḍe m®dumaṁ
dasmitēnduprabhōtkaramugrārikuḷādridarppadaḷanaṁ tībrāsitībraṁ divākaratējaṁ gaṇikāvaḷi ruṁṭēnaṁdeḍēṁ tānenalu doreyāreṁbudu dhātri kauśikakuḷaśrīkāmanaṁ dēmanaṁ .
svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānōṁnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpaṁnaṁ sujanaprasaṁnaṁ vipuḷalakṣmīnivāsavakṣaṁ vaṁdijanajaṁgamakalpavṛkṣaṁ sa
tyarādhēyaṁ sāhasavainatēyaṁ viṣamahayārūḍhaprauḍharēvaṁta vijayalakṣmīkāṁta śauryyakaṁṭhīravaṁ mārkōlabhairavaṁ cōḷabaḷajaladhivaḍabānaḷaṁ kū girakṣa
pāḷaṁ vairiṣārddūḷaṁ raṇaraṁgarāmaṁ śrīmaddēmarasar śrīmaddēmēśvaradēvaraṁ śubhamuhūrttadoḷu supratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi yādēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ sakavarṣada 978 ne
ya hēmaḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada vaiśākhada puṇnami yādityavāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānajapahōmasamādhiśī
laguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmajjanamējayadattiya mahāgrahāra posavaḍaṁgileyūroḍayapramukhamahājanaṁ nūṟippadiṁbara kayyalu sarvvamānyameṁdu dēma na keṟeya
keḷage mattaru vasugeya sthaḷadalu māḷavēśvarada Aḍaketōṁṭa paḍvuṇa baḷā 4 nahaḷi kamma 47 māḷapaśatada taḷavāgila mane 1 māḷapaśadavāgi gaṭṭa
da teṁkaṇa kōḍiyalu māḷapaśatadalu gadde kamma 400 mūḍaṇa vāsugeyalu māḷapaśatada kanakanakeṟeyiṁ paḍvalu māḷa
svasti samastabhuvanabhavanavikhyātapaṁcaśatavīraśāsanalabdhānēkaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛtasatyaśaucā cāracārucāritranayavinayavijñānavīrabaḷaṁjadharmmapratipāḷanaviśuddhaguḍḍadhvajavirājamānānūnasā
hasalakṣmīsamāliṁgitaviśālavakṣasthaḷaruṁ sāhasadiṁ kārttikēyanaṁ śauryyadiṁ vainatēyanaṁ śaucadiṁ gāṁgēyanaṁ satyadiṁ rādhēyanaṁ dānadiṁ varasurabhūjamaṁ caladiṁ kururājanaṁ dharmadiṁ yudhiṣṭhiranaṁ dhairyyadiṁ
mēruvaṁ gāṁbhīryyadiṁ ratnākaramaṁ kṣameyiṁ dharitriyaṁ . śaraṇāgatarggevajrapaṁjaramaṁ pōltu vāsudēvakhaṁḍalīmūḷabhadravaṁśōdbhavaruṁ bhagavatīdēvilabdhavaraprasāda rumenisida dvātriṁśadvēḷāvuramumaṣṭāda
śapaṭṭaṇamuṁ cauśaṣṭi gaidi ga vaṟegaruṁ gātrigaruṁ vēḷakāṟaruṁ bīraruṁ bīravaṇigaruṁ gavuṁḍaruṁ gāvuṁḍasvāmigaḷumayyāvoḷepuraparamēśvararu
mappa śrīmadaynūrvvara vikhyātiyanteṁdaḍe . v® . naḍedude vijitōjvala krava rtigadēṁ bhujabaḷa satataṁ kalibaḷḷi
roppuvaṁ dharitriyoḷu Antenisidaynūrvvaruṁ śrīmaṁnūṟirppadiṁbarumirddu lekhade pāga beḷeya vī
samumaṁ biṭṭaru Adara paḍuva bare nāḍiṁge keḷeyaṁ biṭṭaru baṁdu puguva voṁdu baḷḷamaṁ biṭṭaru naṁdādīvigege vondugāṇada māneṇneyaṁ biṭṭaru telligarayvatto
kkaluṁ soṁṭige yeṇneyaṁ biṭṭaru nakara luttamaṁ biṭṭaru śrīmatu nūrippadiṁbaru dēvarge baidinivēdya yokkaluṁ pullavaḍugarokkaluṁ kalukuṭigarokkaluṁ sarvvamānyamāgi biṭṭaru .
svasti . śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 31 neya sarvvajitsaṁvatsarada caitradamāvāsye sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa viṣusaṁkramaṇadandu śrīmattribhuvanamalladēva
ra maneverggaḍe mahāpradhānananantapāḷayyanaḷiya vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁkadadhikāri daṇḍanāyakaṁ mācidēva śrīdēmēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakke mūru lakṣada vaḍḍarāvuḷada
suṁkavaṁ koṭṭaru tadanantaraṁ śrīmattribhuvanamallapādapadmōpajīvi . ka . vaṁdanamaṁ kiḷigiḷamaṁ caṁdanacāṇakya caukapannavaḷageyisandaṇigaḍaganikaramanondaranimiṣade koṇḍa vīrapāṇḍya .
rvvareyuṁ yāytudvṛttaraṁ kūḍi saṁharisalu karttarivāṇiyāyturu yaśōvatti vitānakketāṁ parinigāytosedāgaḷuṁ vijeya lakṣmīdēvigāḍalu māyte
vīrapāṇḍyabhujadaṇḍōgrāsidhārājaḷaṁ . va . Ā pāṇḍyadēvaru kōgaḷiyanāḍumaṁ kaḍaṁbaḷigenāḍumaṁ ballakuṁdenāḍumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire Ā pāṇḍyadēvara besadiṁ
daṁḍanāyakaṁ ghaṭṭamānara perggeḍeyattimarasaṁ mūrulakṣadaḍakeya perjjuṁkamaṁ biṭṭa śrīmannūṟippadiṁbaru mūrulakṣaḍakeyāyamaṁ biṭṭaru geḍegaḷirvvarokka lu nya biṭṭaru
vineyanidhānaṁ cākarasana tanayaṁ kaśyapānvayaṁbaracaṁdraṁ manumārggacārucaritaṁ janavinuta nityasatyanudayādityaṁ . dēmarasar neṟemāḍida dēmēśvaradēvasadanamaṁ va
sumatiguddāmamenalu māḍisidaṁ dēmēśvaradēvabhṛtyanudayāditya . va . Antu tribhuvanajanastutyanappa keregeyūrūroḍayanudayādityayyaṁ vicitrakūṭatribhuvanati
ḷakamahāśrīsaudhamaṁ kaḷaśārōpaṇamāge māḍisidaṁ tadanaṁtaraṁ . v® . nutabhāradvājagōtrāṁbujadivasakaraṁ caṁdirājātmajātaṁ patibhaktācārecaṭṭāṁbikeya taneyanuddāmasaṁ
pannaguṇānvitanartthibrātaciṁtāmaṇi kuḷatiḷakaṁ dāni dēmēśapādōrjjitalakṣmīkiṁkaraṁ śaṁkaraneḷegesedaṁ vipravidyādharēṁdraṁ . va . Antenisidūroḍeyaṁ caṭṭikavveya śaṁkaramayya yakeṟeya
keḷagaṇa heḷugina taṁma mānyadalbiṭṭaḍakedōṁṭa mū 3 . tē 23 . pa 33 . ba 24 kamma 344 mūḍa taṁmūroḍevānyada modala hasugeyakeyi mattaru 5 mūligālimayyana bammima
yyaṁ tamma mūligamānyada mūḍaṇa keyalu biṭṭa keyi mattaru 6 . v® . tuḷudēśaṁ cakrakūṭaṁ taḷavanapuravuccaṁgi kōḷālavēḷuṁmale vallūrkkaṁcikoṁgarvvisuva hariyaghaṭṭaṁ bayalnāḍu nīḷācaḷadurga
rāyarāyōttamapuri tereyūrkkōvatūrggondavāḍisthaḷamaṁ bhrobhaṁgadiṁ koṁḍatuḷabhujabaḷāṭōpanīviṣṇubhūpaṁ . ka . taḷakāḍu koṁgu naṁgali tuḷunāḍu noḷaṁbavāḍi gaṁgamahīmaṇḍa
ḷamaṁ banavasiyeṁbivaneḷakuḷigoṇḍaṁ jitāri viṣṇuNpāḷa . va . Antuvīraviṣṇu tribhuvanamalla poysaḷadēvaṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ kadaṁbageṟeyoḷage biṭṭa gadde mattaru 5 . v® . surakariyane dāni hari
yante vinītanumēśanante vistaravṛkṣasaṁyutaṁ kamaḷabāndhavanaṁte sadānabhōganaṁbarataḷadanterājakavimitragurudvijasēbyaneṁbudādaradoḷe kūrttu beḷḷaṭeya śaṁkaranāya
kanaṁ jagajjanaṁ . va . Ā kāśyapagōtrapavitraṁ beḷḷaṭeya śaṁkaramayyanāyaka piriyakeṟeya keḷagaṇa haḷuginalu śāntivarmmayyanāyakara śatadalu biṭṭaḍakedōṁṭaṁ mu 3 .
te 9 pa 3 . be 2 kā 1 ba 8 kamma 114 © v® . vinayāmbhōnidhi śāntivarmmavibhugam śrīcaṁdrikākāntegaṁ taneyaṁ kēśavadēvanā prabhuvina strīkaṁciyakkaṁgavā manumārggaṁ guṇi kēśavarggavudayaṁge
ydaṁ nutaṁ vaṁśamaṇḍanabhūṣāmaṇi śāntivarmmananaghaṁ śiṣṭēṣṭakaḷpadrumaṁ . hariyentente vinītanaṁbunidhiyentantudghalāvaṇyanīśvaranentaṁta vṛṣāṁkanuṣṇakaranentante pratāpānvitaṁ dhareyenta
nte samastagōtranirataṁ nāgēṁdranentante vistarabhōga vibhu śāntivarmmananaghaṁ saddharmmadharmmātmaja . varabhāradvājagōtrāgraṇi vibudhanutaṁ śāntivarmmānujaṁ śrīdharanurvvīlōkacintāmaṇi sakaḷa
kaḷādhāranappālimayyaṁ sthiratējaṁ viprarājaṁ vinayajaḷadhi dēmēśapādābjabhṛṁgaṁ hariṇāṁkakṣīraratnākarasadṛśalasatkīrttilakṣmīnivāsa . ka . janavandyanālimayyaṁganujaṁ nijavaṁśavanajavanadivasakaraṁ
manucaritammahadēvaṁ kanakācaḷadhairyyanesedanurvvītaḷadoḷu . va . Antāśāntivarmmanāyakaruvālimayyanāyakaru mahadēva mirddu śrīdēmēśvaraṁgabōgakke piriyakeṟe
ya keḷagaṇa haḷugina taṁma śatadalu biṭṭaḍakedōṁṭa mū 8 . vi . tē 17 pa 9 . vi 2 ba 17 kamma 612 mattaru vasugeyelu śatadalu kariya
kiseṭṭi biṭṭaḍakedōṁṭa kamma 115 . v® . sthiratējōnidhi dharmarājavaravaṁśāṁbhōjatībrāṁśu bāvarasaṁ sadvibhu kēsirāja caṇaṁ budhanātaṁ taṁde
nārāyaṇaṁ paramaprītiyoḷikki nenasu candrārkkaruḷḷaṁnega . mattaṁ būcimayya kōḍiya teṁkaliṁ
biṭṭa gadde matturu gadde kamma 660
Ā śatada sirugadahaḷada Eremattaru 13 maṁji thadēvara śrī
pādārādhakarumappa kāśyapagōtrapavitra
brahmacaryyabratanaiṣṭhika
posavaḍaṁgile
nayyaṁ tanna About eight lines after this have peeled off.
Digital edition of SII 9.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
